# Squirrelll.ing

> Community-based micro-fintech platform that helps people save and
> invest spare change through round-ups, daily savings pools, and
> gamified financial tools.

Squirrelll.ing (pronounced "squirrel-ing") is a pre-launch fintech
app that turns small, everyday spending into automated savings and
micro-investments. The platform combines round-up savings, a
community Daily Pool gamification mechanic, and budgeting tools to
make consistent saving feel effortless. The site currently runs an
email waitlist while the mobile apps are being prepared for launch.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, hero, features, how it works, waitlist signup.
- [What is Squirrellling](/what-is-squirrelll.ing): Long-form explainer of the concept, mechanics, and FAQs.

## Tools

- [Round-Up Savings Calculator](/round-up-calculator): Estimate how much you can save by rounding up everyday purchases.
- [Budget Calculator](/budget-calculator): Plan monthly budgets across income, expenses, and savings goals.

## Legal & Trust

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is collected, used, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): User agreement and platform rules.
- [Payment Security](/payment-security): Encryption, PCI posture, and how payments are safeguarded.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable URL list.
